uploadRecovery.title: Your recording is still available
uploadRecovery.description: The upload to our servers failed. Retry once now. If it fails again, the audio file will be downloaded automatically so you can upload it later.

recovery.title: Recoverable recording found
recovery.description: A previous recording session is still stored locally. Upload it now or discard it.

confirmStop.title: Stop recording?
confirmStop.description: Your recording will be stopped and uploaded.

warnings.stayOnPage: You cannot quit or refresh this page while recording.
warnings.keepPhoneAwake: If you are recording on a phone, keep the screen on to reduce recording interruptions.

alerts.uploadFailedDownloaded: The recording could not be uploaded after a retry. The file "{{fileName}}" has been downloaded and saved on your computer. You can reupload it later or notify the support team.

errors.recordingFailed: Recording failed. Check your microphone permissions and try again.
